overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long GEV Daily ETF (GEVG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in industrials equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of GE Vernova, Inc. (NYSE: GEV) stock, less fees, and expenses GEVG was launched on Dec 16, 2025 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
